description_long: This pizzeria is housed in a charming, multi-story stone building with a rustic Italian architectural style. The facade features a mix of light and reddish-brown stonework, arched windows, and a prominent bell tower with a cross at the top. Ivy climbs up the central section of the building, adding a touch of greenery and character. The ground level opens onto a paved plaza with several outdoor tables and chairs shaded by umbrellas, inviting patrons to dine al fresco. The entrance is flanked by large windows and doors, and the area is bordered by a low stone wall and some small landscaped patches. The overall setting evokes a traditional Italian piazza, blending historical elements with a welcoming, communal atmosphere.
description: A rustic Italian pizzeria with a stone facade, bell tower, ivy, and outdoor seating on a paved plaza.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bell tower, sloped roof, and a row of outdoor tables and umbrellas along the paved area.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the plain stone back walls and the full height of the bell tower, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_2: Angled view focusing on the bell tower, outdoor seating area, and the curve of the plaza with some landscaping.
description_view_3: Frontal view displaying the main entrance, ivy-covered facade, arched windows, and the full outdoor dining area.
